title: Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
